My Review:
Emotionally gripping

This book is long but worth it. It forces you to confront and understand levels of human anguish that you never thought were possible. It is both a tribute to the human spirit but also an admission that no matter how noble one's intentions can be, life can be horribly and unapologetically deterministic.
